TreatmentDetailCTA.title: Speak With Our Medical Coordination Team
TreatmentDetailCTA.subtitle: Share your medical reports and receive guidance from experienced specialists.

hero.title: Cardiac Surgery in India
hero.subtitle: Advanced heart procedures performed by experienced cardiologists.
hero.description: Cardiac surgery helps treat serious heart conditions such as blocked arteries, damaged valves, or congenital heart defects. Patients from around the world travel to India to access experienced heart surgeons, modern hospitals, and advanced surgical technology.

condition.title: Understanding Heart Conditions
condition.description: Heart disease can develop when blood flow to the heart is restricted or when heart valves do not function properly. In some cases, surgery may be required to restore normal heart function and improve overall health.

items.title: Coronary Artery Bypass Surgery
items.desc: Improves blood flow to the heart by bypassing blocked arteries.

items.title: Heart Valve Replacement
items.desc: Repairs or replaces damaged heart valves to restore normal blood flow.

items.title: Minimally Invasive Cardiac Surgery
items.desc: Uses smaller incisions for certain heart procedures, reducing recovery time.

cost.title: Treatment Cost Overview
cost.description: Heart surgery costs in India are significantly lower than in many countries while maintaining high medical standards. The final cost depends on hospital choice and patient condition.

recovery.title: Recovery and Aftercare
recovery.description: Patients typically stay in hospital for 5 to 7 days after surgery. Recovery time may vary depending on the procedure and overall health condition.

faq.q: How long do patients stay in India after heart surgery?
faq.a: Most patients stay for approximately two to three weeks to allow proper recovery and follow-up consultations.

faq.q: Can doctors review my reports before I travel?
faq.a: Yes, patients can share their medical reports for evaluation before planning travel.

hero.title: Orthopedic Surgery in India
hero.subtitle: Advanced joint replacement and orthopedic procedures.
hero.description: Orthopedic surgery helps treat conditions affecting bones, joints, and muscles. Patients travel to India for procedures such as joint replacement and sports injury treatment performed by experienced orthopedic specialists.

condition.title: Understanding Orthopedic Conditions
condition.description: Orthopedic conditions may develop due to aging, injury, or degenerative diseases affecting bones and joints. Surgical treatment may help restore mobility and reduce pain.

items.title: Knee Replacement Surgery
items.desc: Replaces damaged knee joints to restore mobility.

items.title: Hip Replacement Surgery
items.desc: Improves movement by replacing damaged hip joints.

items.title: Arthroscopic Surgery
items.desc: Minimally invasive procedure used to diagnose and treat joint problems.

hero.title: Spine Surgery in India
hero.subtitle: Advanced treatment for spinal disorders and back pain.
hero.description: Spine surgery is performed to treat conditions such as herniated discs, spinal stenosis, and spinal deformities. Modern surgical techniques help relieve pain and restore mobility.

condition.title: Understanding Spine Conditions
condition.description: Spinal disorders can affect nerves, discs, or bones in the spine. In some cases, surgery may be required when non-surgical treatments do not provide relief.

hero.title: Cancer Treatment in India
hero.subtitle: Comprehensive oncology care supported by modern diagnostic tools and advanced treatment approaches.
hero.description: Cancer treatment in India offers patients access to experienced oncologists, modern radiation and chemotherapy facilities, and multidisciplinary care teams. Patients from around the world choose India for its advanced treatment options and cost-effective care.

condition.title: Understanding Cancer
condition.description: Cancer is a group of diseases characterized by abnormal cell growth that can invade other parts of the body. Treatment depends on the type, location, and stage of cancer, and may involve surgery, radiation, chemotherapy, or targeted therapies.

symptoms.title: Common Symptoms
items: Lumps or thickening under the skin
Changes in skin (yellowing, darkening, or redness)

items.title: Surgical Oncology
items.desc: Removal of cancerous tumors and affected tissue by specialized surgeons.

items.title: Radiation Therapy
items.desc: High-energy radiation to shrink tumors and kill cancer cells.

items.title: Chemotherapy
items.desc: Use of drugs to stop the growth of cancer cells.

cost.title: Treatment Cost Overview
cost.description: Cancer treatment costs in India are significantly lower than in many Western countries while maintaining high standards of care. The final cost depends on the type and stage of cancer, hospital choice, and treatment duration.

recovery.title: Recovery and Aftercare
recovery.description: Recovery time varies depending on the treatment. Patients may need several weeks to months for full recovery, with regular follow-ups to monitor progress.

faq.q: How long do cancer patients stay in India?
faq.a: The duration depends on the treatment plan. Surgery may require 2‑4 weeks, while radiation or chemotherapy can take several months with periodic visits.

faq.q: Can I get a second opinion from Indian oncologists?
faq.a: Yes, you can share your reports for a second opinion before deciding on treatment.

hero.title: Cosmetic Surgery in India
hero.subtitle: Safe and personalized aesthetic procedures performed by qualified plastic surgeons.
hero.description: Cosmetic surgery helps enhance appearance and boost confidence. India offers advanced facilities and experienced surgeons for procedures such as rhinoplasty, breast augmentation, liposuction, and facelifts at affordable costs.

condition.title: Understanding Cosmetic Surgery
condition.description: Cosmetic surgery is performed to reshape normal structures of the body to improve appearance and self-esteem. It includes both surgical and non‑surgical procedures.

symptoms.title: Common Reasons for Cosmetic Surgery
items: Desire for breast enhancement or reduction
Excess fat resistant to diet and exercise
Aging signs like wrinkles or sagging skin

items.title: Rhinoplasty
items.desc: Reshaping the nose for aesthetic or functional improvement.

items.title: Breast Augmentation
items.desc: Enlargement of breasts using implants or fat transfer.

items.title: Liposuction
items.desc: Removal of excess fat from specific areas.

cost.title: Treatment Cost Overview
cost.description: Cosmetic surgery costs in India are a fraction of those in Western countries, with no compromise on quality. The final cost depends on the procedure, surgeon, and hospital.

recovery.title: Recovery and Aftercare
recovery.description: Recovery times vary by procedure. Most patients can resume normal activities within 2‑4 weeks, with full results visible after several months.

faq.q: How long do I need to stay in India for cosmetic surgery?
faq.a: Typically 2‑3 weeks for surgery and initial recovery, with follow‑up consultations before returning home.

faq.q: Is cosmetic surgery safe in India?
faq.a: Yes, when performed by qualified plastic surgeons in accredited hospitals. Our partner hospitals meet international safety standards.

hero.title: Fertility Treatment in India
hero.subtitle: Advanced reproductive care supported by experienced fertility specialists.
hero.description: India has become a leading destination for fertility treatments such as IVF, ICSI, and egg freezing. Patients benefit from modern laboratories, high success rates, and compassionate care at affordable costs.

condition.title: Understanding Fertility Challenges
condition.description: Infertility affects many couples and can be caused by various factors in either partner. Treatments range from medication to assisted reproductive technologies like IVF.

symptoms.title: When to Seek Help
items: Inability to conceive after 1 year of trying

items.title: In Vitro Fertilization (IVF)
items.desc: Eggs are fertilized with sperm in a lab, then transferred to the uterus.

items.title: ICSI
items.desc: A single sperm is injected into an egg to assist fertilization.

items.title: Egg Freezing
items.desc: Eggs are harvested and frozen for future use.

cost.title: Treatment Cost Overview
cost.description: Fertility treatment in India is significantly more affordable than in many countries, with transparent pricing and high‑quality care. Costs vary depending on the number of cycles and additional procedures.

recovery.title: Recovery and Aftercare
recovery.description: Recovery from egg retrieval is usually quick, with mild discomfort. After embryo transfer, patients can resume normal activities with some precautions.

faq.q: How long does an IVF cycle take?
faq.a: A complete IVF cycle takes about 4‑6 weeks from start to pregnancy test.

faq.q: What is the success rate of IVF in India?
faq.a: Success rates vary by age and diagnosis, but many clinics report rates comparable to international standards.

hero.title: Organ Transplant Programs in India
hero.subtitle: Highly specialized transplant procedures performed by experienced medical teams.
hero.description: Organ transplantation offers life-saving treatment for patients with severe organ failure. India has established transplant centers with experienced specialists and advanced medical infrastructure.

condition.title: When Organ Transplant May Be Needed
condition.description: Transplants may be required when vital organs such as the kidney or liver stop functioning properly and cannot be treated through medication alone.

items.title: Kidney Transplant
items.desc: Replaces a failed kidney with a healthy donor kidney.

items.title: Liver Transplant
items.desc: A life-saving procedure for patients with severe liver disease.

hero.title: Guiding International Patients Toward Trusted Medical Care

story.title: Our Story
story.text: Many international patients struggle to find reliable medical information and trustworthy hospitals when seeking treatment abroad. Medictour Global was founded to bridge that gap by helping patients connect with experienced doctors and accredited hospitals in India while receiving clear guidance throughout their medical journey.

mission.missionText: Provide international patients with transparent, coordinated, and compassionate medical travel support.
mission.visionText: Become a trusted global partner for patients seeking high-quality medical treatment abroad.

questions.q: How long does the treatment process take?
questions.a: The timeline depends on the medical condition and recommended treatment plan. Our team will provide a clear estimate during the planning stage.

questions.q: Do I need a medical visa?
questions.a: Most international patients require a medical visa for treatment in India. Our team can guide you through the application process.

questions.q: Will someone assist me when I arrive?
questions.a: Yes, we coordinate airport pickup and hospital admission to ensure a smooth arrival.

questions.q: Can I travel with a family member?
questions.a: Absolutely. We encourage patients to bring a companion for support and can assist with accommodation arrangements.
